title: corniola ovata
intro: Corniola ovata, also known as African boxwood or corian, is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corniola ovata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Corniola ovata is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, and its essential oils are also used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
